arabic_text: مِن دُرَّةٍ بَيْضَاءَ صَافِيَةٍ — مِمَّا تَرَتَّبَ حَائِرَ الْبَحْرِ
alt_text: Single Arabic poetic couplet: 'From a pure white pearl — from that which has set apart the depth of the sea.' (basit/kamil-style meter).
notes: Poetic line in a teaching context, likely about cosmogenesis (the pearl-of-origin motif common in Ismaili literature).
